hero.systemVersion: MODBUS RTU TESTING TOOL — FREE & ONLINE
hero.title: Test Modbus RTU Devices Directly From Your Browser
hero.subtitle: The first online Modbus client for RS485 communication. Read and write registers, scan the bus, and automate test sequences — no installation, no drivers, no desktop software required.

audience.title: Built for Industrial Professionals
audience.desc: A dedicated Modbus RTU testing tool designed for engineers who need fast, reliable diagnostics — without installing desktop software.
audience.fieldEngDesc: On-site Modbus RTU diagnostics from any laptop. Plug in your USB-RS485 adapter, open Chrome, and start reading registers in seconds.
audience.plcDevDesc: Validate register maps, test slave responses, and automate commissioning sequences without leaving the browser.
audience.sysIntDesc: Scan entire RS485 networks, detect slave ID collisions, and verify communication across complex multi-device topologies.

features.registersTitle: Modbus Register Mapping — Read & Write in Real Time
features.registersDesc: Read Holding Registers (FC03), Input Registers (FC04), and write single or multiple registers (FC06/FC16). Raw hex frames displayed live with automatic CRC-16 validation.
features.registersItem1: Multi-format display: Float32, Int16, Int32, BCD, Hex
features.registersItem3: Export logs to CSV and JSON for offline analysis
features.scanTitle: RS485 Bus Scanner — Auto-Detect All Modbus Slaves
features.scanDesc: Automatically scan your entire RS485 network to detect all active slave devices (IDs 1–247). Smart baud rate and parity detection — no manual configuration needed.

comparison.title: Why Engineers Switch from Desktop Tools
comparison.desc: modclient gives you the core capabilities of QModMaster, Modbus Poll, and ModScan — without the installation, the license cost, or the OS restriction.
comparison.feature2: Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux
comparison.feature3: Free plan with no time limit

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is a Modbus RTU testing tool?
faq.a1: A Modbus RTU testing tool lets you send and receive Modbus frames to slave devices over an RS485 serial bus. It is used to read sensor values, write setpoints, and verify device communication during commissioning or troubleshooting.
faq.q2: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a2: No. modclient runs entirely in Chrome or Edge using the Web Serial API. Just plug in your USB-RS485 adapter and open the app.
faq.a3: Yes. The Technician Free plan has no time limit and includes register reading/writing, the frame console, and basic automations.
faq.q4: Is this an alternative to QModMaster or Modbus Poll?
faq.a4: Yes. modclient provides the same core Modbus master functionality as QModMaster, Modbus Poll, and ModScan — but it runs in the browser, so there is nothing to install and it works on any OS.

pricing.title: Free Modbus Testing. Scale When You Need.
pricing.desc: Start with the free plan — no credit card, no time limit. Upgrade to unlock advanced features for demanding projects.

footer.desc: Free online Modbus RTU testing tool. No installation required.
